ValidationRule.description: Equipment Type is required when load is posted. Carrier assignment depends on equipment availability.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status__c))), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "posted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "quoted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "tendered"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "accepted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "dispatched"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "in_transit"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "delivered"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "pod_captured"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "invoiced"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "settled"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "completed") ), ISBLANK(Equipment_Type__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Equipment Type is required for posted loads. Specify the equipment needed (e.g., Flatbed, Van, Reefer, Tank) before posting.
